title: Contact

content:
I am a Data Science Consultant with extensive experience in data intelligence, business analytics, and machine learning. Below are some key projects I have worked on. You can also check out my profiles on Upwork and GitHub for more details on my work.
Key Projects Market Intelligence Dashboard for Ecommerce
UK (Fall 2023)
Developed a market intelligence dashboard using AWS QuickSight and Python to help businesses understand e-commerce data. The dashboard provided insights on customer behavior, sales trends, and product performance, empowering decision-makers with actionable intelligence.
Wind Power Forecasting Using XGBoost
USA (Spring 2024)
Built a wind power forecasting model using XGBoost and Neural Networks for optimizing energy management. The model predicted wind power generation to help in resource allocation and management.
Algorithm for Credit Scoring
UK (Winter 2024)
Designed a Python-based algorithm for credit scoring that assessed financial risk, improving decision-making processes for loans and credit services.
Rainfall Prediction for Agricultural Insurance
Kenya (Winter 2024)
Applied machine learning models in R and Python to predict rainfall patterns, which helped farmers in Kenya secure better agricultural insurance policies by managing weather risks more effectively.
Customer Segmentation and Targeting for E-commerce
USA (Spring 2023)
Applied K-means clustering using Python to segment e-commerce customers, identifying distinct customer groups for targeted marketing and personalized customer engagement strategies.
Socio-Economic Indicators for Real Estate Investment
France (Fall 2023)
Analyzed socio-economic data with Python and Scikit-learn to identify potential real estate investment opportunities in underserved regions, driving better investment decisions for real estate firms.
Evaluation of Customer Feedback – Marketing
Germany (Winter 2023)
Utilized NLP models and geospatial analysis to analyze customer feedback and improve marketing strategies for a leading European tech company, identifying key areas of customer dissatisfaction.
Energy Consumption Prediction for Smart Homes
USA (Fall 2022)
Developed a predictive model using machine learning algorithms such as Random Forest to estimate household energy consumption and optimize smart home energy management systems.
Retail Inventory Optimization Using Machine Learning
Canada (Winter 2024)
Created a machine learning model in Python that optimized retail inventory levels by predicting product demand, reducing excess stock, and preventing stockouts, resulting in improved inventory turnover.
Predictive Maintenance for Manufacturing Equipment
Japan (Spring 2022)
Designed a predictive maintenance solution for a manufacturing company using Azure ML and Python, reducing equipment downtime by predicting potential failures and scheduling proactive maintenance.
For collaboration inquiries, feel free to contact me via email: aru.bhardwaj@insightrix.eu.
title: Portfolio

content:
As a Data Science Consultant with over 5 years of experience, I offer a range of services that cater to businesses and organizations looking to leverage data for actionable insights, optimize processes, and drive growth. Below are the services I specialize in:
1. Machine Learning & Predictive Analytics Use data to make future predictions and automate decision-making processes:
Design and deployment of machine learning models (e.g., Random Forest, XGBoost, Neural Networks). Predictive maintenance, demand forecasting, and customer behavior modeling. Model development for credit scoring, market analysis, and trend prediction using Python, R, and SQL. 2. Business Intelligence & Data Visualization Transform your raw data into actionable insights with visually intuitive and interactive dashboards:
Development of dynamic dashboards using Power BI, Tableau, and AWS QuickSight. Visual storytelling of data for business performance, sales, marketing, and customer insights. Design and implementation of customized BI solutions tailored to specific business needs. 3. Custom Machine Learning Solutions for Businesses Tailored machine learning solutions to address unique business challenges:
Development of end-to-end solutions for credit scoring, customer segmentation, and inventory optimization. Custom algorithms for specific industry needs, including real estate, finance, and e-commerce. Continuous support and model maintenance to ensure scalability and performance. 4. Geospatial Analysis & Mapping Solutions Leverage geospatial data to gain deeper insights into location-based phenomena:
Geospatial data processing using ArcGIS, QGIS, and GeoPandas. Map visualizations and topological analysis to support decision-making in urban planning, logistics, and real estate. Geospatial econometrics and integration of spatial data with machine learning models. 5. Survey Analytics & Market Research Transform survey and customer feedback data into meaningful business insights:
Survey design, analysis, and implementation using tools like R, Python, and SQL. Development of advanced survey analysis tools to drive decision-making and policy formation. Customer segmentation and feedback evaluation for product and marketing optimization. 6. Data Engineering & Cloud Solutions Efficiently manage and process large datasets through scalable cloud-based solutions:
Design and management of data pipelines using AWS, SageMaker, EMR, Glue, and EC2. Cloud-based architecture for big data analysis, scalable computing, and distributed systems. Expertise in building and deploying data engineering solutions on AWS and Azure platforms. 7. Advanced Statistical Analysis Utilize statistical methods to understand trends, correlations, and patterns in your data:
Statistical modeling, hypothesis testing, and regression analysis using Python, R, and Julia. Time-series analysis for trend detection, forecasting, and anomaly detection. Expertise in econometrics for policy analysis, market research, and financial risk assessment. Why Work with Me? Experience: I have worked with over 35 companies, providing data-driven insights across multiple industries, including tech, finance, e-commerce, and manufacturing. Expertise: I am proficient in a range of tools, platforms, and programming languages, ensuring I can tackle any data-related challenge. Customization: I offer tailored solutions specific to your business needs and challenges, ensuring high-impact results. Collaborative Approach: I work closely with your team to understand your business objectives and deliver actionable insights. I charge €90/hour or €450/day.
For any inquiries or to discuss how I can help your business, feel free to contact me at aru.bhardwaj@insightrix.eu.
title: Services
